## What does this PR add or fix?

<!-- One line. Example: "Add P0171 (System Too Lean Bank 1) to data/generic/P0xxx.yaml" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New code(s)
- [ ] Correction to existing code
- [ ] PID(s) added
- [ ] Tooling / schema / documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Codes are inserted in numeric order in the correct file
- [ ] At least one `sources:` entry per code (URL or document reference)
- [ ] No verbatim text from copyrighted manuals
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally
- [ ] By submitting this PR I dedicate my contribution to the public domain under [CC0-1.0](../LICENSE-DATA) (data) or release it under [MIT](../LICENSE-CODE) (code)
